businessSummary.oneLiner: Southeast Asia's largest e-commerce (Shopee), digital entertainment (Garena/Free Fire), and fintech (Monee) operator — Singapore-based global internet company
businessSummary.description: Sea Limited is a Singapore-based global tech company operating e-commerce (Shopee), gaming (Garena), and digital finance (Monee) across Southeast Asia, Latin America, and Taiwan. Q4 2025 revenue $6.85B (+38.4% YoY), EPS $0.63 (+61.5%). Beat estimates on both but plunged -16.53% on Monee credit loss provisions +66.7% and Garena bookings QoQ decline. Hit 52-week low of $80.01 intraday, closed at $87.82. FY2025 revenue $22.94B (+36.4%), net income $1.58B (+255%). P/E ~30.4x, Forward P/E ~20.0x.
howTheyMakeMoney: E-commerce (Shopee): #1 SE Asia e-commerce platform. GMV-based fees and advertising. Q4 revenue +35.8%
Digital Finance (Monee/SeaMoney): Digital payments, lending, insurance. Q4 revenue +54.3%, loan book $9.2B (+80%)
Digital Entertainment (Garena): Free Fire and other games. Q4 bookings +23.8% YoY (QoQ decline)
keyProducts: Shopee: #1 e-commerce in SE Asia and Latin America
Free Fire: Global battle royale mobile game
SeaMoney/Monee: Digital payments and financial services, loan book $9.2B

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Compressed after earnings sell-off. Based on FY2025 net income $1.58B

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2026 EPS $4.40 forecast. PEG ~0.46 signals extreme undervaluation vs growth

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth
keyMetrics.interpretation: Q4 +38.4%. Shopee and Monee dual-axis high growth

keyMetrics.name: Gross Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: E-commerce + gaming blended margin. Gradual improvement trend

keyMetrics.name: ROE
keyMetrics.interpretation: Capital efficiency improving post profitability turnaround

keyMetrics.name: Monee Loan Book
keyMetrics.interpretation: Aggressive lending expansion. Credit provisions +66.7% causing market concern

growthDrivers.title: Q4 2025 Revenue and EPS Both Beat Consensus
growthDrivers.description: Q4 revenue $6.85B (+38.4%), EPS $0.63 (+61.5%). Both exceeded analyst expectations.

growthDrivers.title: Shopee VIP Program Aggressive Expansion — Long-term Lock-in
growthDrivers.description: Shopee expanding VIP program aggressively, temporarily pressuring margins but building long-term customer loyalty.

growthDrivers.title: Monee AI-Powered Lending — New Customer Segments
growthDrivers.description: AI-assisted underwriting expanding lending to new borrowers. Loan book +80%. Higher provisions reflect prudent risk management.

growthDrivers.title: FY2025 Revenue $22.94B (+36.4%), Net Income +255%
growthDrivers.description: On annual basis, overwhelming growth. Net income tripled to $1.58B.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: #1 SE Asia e-commerce (Shopee), 670M population digitalization tailwind. E-commerce-fintech-gaming ecosystem synergy is the core moat.

moats.description: Shopee's two-sided seller-buyer network. More sellers → more buyers.
#1 e-commerce in 6 SE Asian countries. In-house logistics (Shopee Express).

competitors.name: TikTok Shop/Lazada
competitors.detail: SE Asia social commerce surging. Biggest threat to Shopee. Bloomberg: competition squeezing margins

competitors.name: MercadoLibre (MELI)
competitors.detail: Latin America #1 e-commerce. Direct competition with Shopee in Brazil. MELI also -17% same day

competitors.name: Grab (GRAB)
competitors.detail: SE Asia super-app. Competing in fintech and delivery

competitors.name: Alibaba/Lazada
competitors.detail: Alibaba funding accelerating SE Asia push

recentNews.headline: Sea Limited Q4 Earnings: Revenue & EPS Beat but Stock Plunges -16.53%
recentNews.significance: Revenue $6.85B (+38.4%), EPS $0.63 (+61.5%) both beat. Monee provisions +66.7% and Garena QoQ decline triggered sell-off.

recentNews.headline: Bloomberg: Sea Shares Plunge Most Since 2023 — TikTok/Lazada Competition
SE Hits 52-Week Low at $80.01 Before Recovering to $87.82
recentNews.significance: Intraday -26.8% before partial recovery. Down -56% from 52-week high $199.30.

recentNews.headline: 247WallSt: MercadoLibre vs Sea — Both -17% After Earnings Despite 38% Revenue Growth
recentNews.significance: Emerging market e-commerce sector-wide sell-off despite strong growth.

recentNews.headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on SE, $173 Target
recentNews.significance: Based on 20-25% GMV growth and flat e-commerce margins for 2026. +97% upside from current.

analystOpinions.notableComment: 11 of 12 Buy. Strong Buy consensus $189.41 (+116%). Morgan Stanley OW $173. Current $87.82 is 48% below the lowest analyst target of $130.

risks.title: 56% Decline from 52-Week High — Severe Downtrend
risks.description: $199.30 to $87.82. Hit $80.01 intraday new low. Strong technical downtrend. Further decline possible.

risks.title: TikTok Shop/Lazada Competition — Structural Margin Pressure
risks.description: Well-funded TikTok and Alibaba engaging in aggressive price competition. Shopee margin improvement may be delayed.

risks.title: Monee Loan Book Rapid Expansion — Credit Risk
risks.description: Loan book +80% with provisions +66.7%. SE Asia economic slowdown could materialize credit losses.

risks.title: Garena Bookings QoQ Decline — High-Margin Business Slowing
risks.description: Both users and bookings fell quarter-over-quarter. Gaming recovery sustainability uncertain.

risks.title: Iran/Hormuz Geopolitical Risk — Emerging Market Capital Flight
risks.description: Geopolitical uncertainty accelerates EM capital outflows. SE Asia currency weakness pressure.

buyReasons.title: Forward P/E 20x, PEG ~0.46 — Extreme Undervaluation
buyReasons.rationale: +36% growth at Forward P/E 20x. Below every analyst's lowest target ($130) by 48%.

buyReasons.title: Revenue & EPS Both Beat — Solid Fundamentals
buyReasons.rationale: Q4 revenue $6.85B (+38.4%), EPS $0.63 (+61.5%). Growth fundamentals remain strong.

buyReasons.title: Excessive Sell-off — Motley Fool 'Overdone' Assessment
buyReasons.rationale: From -26.8% intraday to -16.5% close. Analysts see VIP/lending expansion as long-term investments, sell-off as overdone.

buyReasons.title: 11 of 12 Strong Buy — Consensus $189 (+116%)
buyReasons.rationale: Morgan Stanley OW $173. Overwhelming buy consensus. Current price is extreme discount.

overallOpinion: Mar 3 close $87.82 (-16.53%). Q4 revenue $6.85B (+38.4%), EPS $0.63 (+61.5%) both beat but market panicked over Monee provisions +66.7% and Garena QoQ decline. Hit 52-week low $80.01 intraday.
11 of 12 Buy. Strong Buy consensus $189.41 (+116%). Forward P/E 20x, PEG ~0.46. Below every analyst's lowest target $130 by 48% — extreme undervaluation.
$87.82, well below 50-day ($118) and 200-day ($140). RSI 22 deeply oversold. Technical bounce likely but trend reversal needs time.

threads.hook: SE $87, beat on revenue & EPS but -17% crash? Cheaper than every analyst target
threads.text: $SE (3/4) Q4 revenue $6.85B (+38.4%), EPS +61.5% — both beat consensus. But Monee provision fears triggered -16.5% crash to 52-week low. Forward P/E 20x, below every analyst's lowest target $130 by 48%. Overreaction or justified fear? investory.kro.kr/stock/SE/analysis/2026-03-04
